titleStmt.title: SII 25.298: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 298. (A.R. No. 298 of 1908.) TIRUKKAḶITTAṬṬAI, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the central shrine in the Vēdapurīśvara temple.
This record may palaeographically be assigned to c. 10th century.
The Rājarājakēsarivarman referred to here may be identified with Rājarāja I.

It registers the grant of eṇmāv-arai-araikkāṇi lands made after purchase, to provide for the supply of 108 pots of bathing water (snapanam-āḍiaruḷuvadaṟku) and for the food-offerings to be made on the day of makarasaṅkrānti to the deity Tirukuḍittiṭṭai-mahādēvar of Avaninārāyaṇachchaturvēdimaṅgalam, a dēvadāna and brahmadēya on the northern bank (of the river Kāvēri), by Kiḻānaḍigaḷ, daughter of Viḻupparaiyar and the queen of Uttamachōḷa, son of Gaṇḍarādittadēva.
The other queen that is mentioned in an undated record from Kāñchīpuram is Vīranāraṇiyār (See S.I.I., Vol. XXII, pt I, No. 3).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kovirājarājakesari panmaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu vaṭakarait tevatāṉa brahmadeyam Avaṉi nārāyaṇaccaturvetimaṅkalattiṟkuk kuṭittiṭṭai mahādevaṟku śrī kaṇṭarāditta devar tirumakaṉār śrī Uttamacoḻatevar teviyār kiḻāṉaṭikaḷār It devaṟku śrī makaracaṅkirāntikaṭoṟum nūṟṟeṭṭuk kalacaṅkoṇṭu snapaṉam Āṭi Aruḷuvataṟkum peruntiruvamutu ceytaruḷuvataṟkum veṇṭuvataṟku Ivvūr mum l Irāmapaṭṭaṉ pakkal Ivvūrkkamuru
k kāliṉ kiḻ pakkatir koṇṭa nilam Eṇmāvarai Araikkāṇikku kiḻpāṟkellai Iṟaṅkaṇṭit tiruvicalūraṭikaṭaRead ‘aṭikaḷ’kiramavittaṉ ṉilattukkum korovi viṣṇuppiripuriya nilattukkum tūṟpil nilattukkum Āka Āmmūvar nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟukkuḻi kuñca ciṉṉayak kiramavittaccomāciyār nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kārampiceṭṭuttūṟpil tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇaccaturvveti- paṭṭac comayāci
yār makaṉ Eccatoṇa paṭṭaṉ nilattukkum Inta sarasvati vāykkālukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Inta sarasvati vāykkālukkum Iraṅkaṇṭit tiruvicalūrraṭikaḷ kiramavittaṉ nilattukku teṟkum Innaṭuvupaṭṭa nilattiṟ kaṇṇāṟṟukku Ikkaṇṇāṟṟukkut teṉkaraiyum vaṭakaraiyumāka nilam Eṇmāvaraikkāṇi ṭak ḻic ceri ṉ pakkale koṇṭa nattam
maṇai Araikkāṇikku kiḻpāṟkellaikku ciṉṉaya kiramavittac comāciyār nilattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ic ciṉṉayak kiramavittac comāciyār nattam maṉai nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai ṉāṅkaḷIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 25.298 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
